// PROFILE: sandbox-on — sandboxed bash, automatic decisions inside the box
// USE CASE: Trusted automation with strong isolation. Bash runs in a sandbox; auto mode handles edits and reads without prompting.
// COMPOSE: Pair with the project's own deny list. Auto mode escalates anything outside the sandbox.

auto.// CLASSIFIER: Inside-the-box decisions are automatic. Outside-the-box bash escalates.
